verse_text: And Nathanael said to him, 'Can anything good come out of Nazareth?'

links.context: The prophecy here cannot be exactly identified. It has been taken as a reference to the rod (Heb. neser) in Is 11:1, and to the Nazirite (Heb. Nazir) of [[JDG.13:5]]. Matthew may also have been alluding to passages in which the Messiah was despised, since Nazareth did not have a good reputation ([[JOH.1:46]]).
